# Architecture Decision Records

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory contains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for `contentful.net`. Each ADR documents a meaningful technical decision: what was chosen, why, and what trade-offs were accepted.

## Index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|---|---|---|
| [001](./001-netstandard2-targeting.md) | Target netstandard2.0 | Accepted |
| [002](./002-newtonsoft-json.md) | Use Newtonsoft.Json for Serialization | Accepted |
| [003](./003-httpclient-injection.md) | Caller-Injected HttpClient | Accepted |
| [004](./004-two-nuget-packages.md) | Two Separate NuGet Packages | Accepted |
| [005](./005-devcontainer-ci-parity.md) | Devcontainer for CI/Local Parity | Accepted |
| [006](./006-manual-nuget-release.md) | Manual NuGet Release Process | Accepted |

## Adding a New ADR

1. Copy the ADR template (use the structure: Status / Context / Decision / Consequences)
2. Number sequentially
3. Add to the index above
4. Reference from ARCHITECTURE.md or AGENTS.md if the ADR introduces a new invariant
